title: More Nonsense Limerick 40
content:
There was an old person of Pisa,
    Whose daughters did nothing to please her;
    She dressed them in gray, 
    And banged them all day,
    Round the walls of the city of Pisa.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 40"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
